name: Stop Shot
description: Stun the cue ball so it stops dead after contact. Center-low hit, medium speed.

name: Follow Shot
description: Cue ball follows through after contact. Hit above center - cue ball should reach the far rail.

name: Draw Shot
description: Pull the cue ball back after contact. Hit low with a smooth follow-through.

name: Two-Ball Position 1/2
description: Pot the 1-ball into the corner. Use follow to get position on the 2-ball.

name: Two-Ball Position 2/2
description: Now pot the 2-ball from where your follow left you.

name: Three-Ball Run 1/3
description: Pot the 1-ball and get position on the 2. All three balls are on the table.

name: Three-Ball Run 2/3
description: Pot the 2-ball and get position on the 3.

name: L-Shape 1/3
description: Draw back to get position on the 2. All three balls on the table.

name: L-Shape 2/3
description: Follow through to get position on the 3-ball.

name: L-Shape 3/3
description: Final ball into the corner. Finish the L-shape.
